name: Sour Orange Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup apricot nectar or sour orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, Jell-O, eggs, oil, and fruit juice until well combined.
2. Stir in the chopped nuts.
3. Grease a Bundt pan with Pam or Baker's Joy and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
6. Reduce the temperature to 325°F (160°C) and bake for an additional 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. For the glaze, mix 1 teaspoon of sour orange juice with enough powdered sugar to reach your desired consistency. If using apricot nectar, add 1 tablespoon of lemon or lime juice to sour it further. If using only apricot nectar, add 1 tablespoon of brandy for flavor.
WARNING: To ensure the recipe is safe and easily understood by all users, please avoid aggressive culinary terms. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat," and avoid words like "destroy," "burn," "splutter," or "execute."
